sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports severe pain in his abdomen, rated 8 out of 10. He also reports weight loss over the past three months and constipation for the last two weeks. The patient reports intermittent dizziness when standing.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 100/60 mmHg. Heart rate is 88 bpm. Temperature is 98.6°F. Physical exam reveals mild abdominal tenderness to palpation in the right lower quadrant.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms and physical exam findings are concerning for possible ovarian cancer, given the reported weight loss and abdominal pain. Further investigation is warranted.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor wants to perform a lymph node dissection. The doctor wants to perform a hysterectomy. The doctor wants to administer intraperitoneal chemotherapy. The doctor wants to start chemotherapy. The doctor recommends genetic counseling. Order pathology evaluation of the abdominal mass.
